name: Chocolate Velvet Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs, pecans, granulated sugar, and melted margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F. for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the cream cheese and brown sugar until well blended. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in the melted chocolate and almond liqueur; pour over the crust.
4. Bake at 325 degrees F. for 35 minutes.
5. Increase the oven temperature to 425 degrees F. Combine the sour cream and granulated sugar in a separate bowl. Carefully spread the mixture over the cheesecake.
6. Bake at 425 degrees F. for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, then carefully remove the rim of the pan. Allow the cheesecake to cool before serving.
8. Variation: Substitute 2 tablespoons milk and 1/4 teaspoon almond extract for the almond liqueur.
